C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc lib\libLowLevelEntities.a CMakeFiles/LowLevelEntities.dir/src/lowLevelEntities/Card.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/LowLevelEntities.dir/src/lowLevelEntities/Deck.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/LowLevelEntities.dir/src/lowLevelEntities/GameState.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/LowLevelEntities.dir/src/lowLevelEntities/Player.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/LowLevelEntities.dir/src/lowLevelEntities/VisualState.cpp.obj
C:\mingw64\bin\ranlib.exe lib\libLowLevelEntities.a
